title: Trademark Watch Service - BookMyTM, Kochi, Kerala

blocks.text: Monitor potential infringements and protect your brand identity.
Fill the details below for a callback.
A Registered and Established Trademark is an asset to a business. It is important for a business owner to ensure effective use and the safety of the mark.

With trademark watch service, BookMyTM examines all relevant trademark registers to identify trademarks which are identical or similar to your registered mark. We ensure your mark is protected from infringers or unauthorized users using advanced monitoring algorithms.
Protects against potential infringements by monitoring similar marks. Enables you to initiate timely action against unauthorized usage before it dilutes your brand value.

Our attorneys provide an opinion based on the watch report results, considering prior rights and likely impact on your business. This proactive approach prevents trademark dilution—the blurring or fading of a famous trademark.
Fill the details below for a callback.
Copy of Registration Certificate of the Trademark currently in use.
Agreement with BookMyTM for activation of the Trademark Watch Service.
Select package, fill form & make payment.
Watch Service active within 3 working days*.

items: Your Trademark Watch Service is activated

blocks.text: The Indian Trademark Registry processes thousands of applications weekly. Mistakes happen. A mark very similar to yours might slip through the examination stage and get published in the Journal.
A competitor might register "BookMyTM Kerala" when you own "BookMyTM." If you don't spot this in the Journal and oppose it within 4 months, they get the registration.
Once they are registered, you cannot use the cheap "Opposition" process. You must file a "Rectification" or a Civil Suit in the High Court, which costs 10x more and takes years.
Our Watch Service is not just an automated script.
We scan logos that copy your color scheme or design geometry.
In a multi-lingual market like India, we even check if someone is registering the translation of your English brand name into Malayalam or Hindi.

items.a: It is a monitoring service to ensure effective use and safety of your mark by identifying identical or similar marks in relevant trademark registers.
It protects against potential infringements by monitoring the market. It enables firms to initiate action against unauthorized use before it dilutes the brand.

items.q: 3. Who is this service aimed at?
items.a: Any company or individual who considers their trademarks an important asset. It helps monitor new applications to protect rights conferred by your own trademark.

items.q: 4. How is the service carried out?
items.a: Our experts permanently monitor Industrial Property Bulletins using cutting-edge technology to detect new applications that could affect your trademarks.
